top_signals.title: How much is trade policy influencing imports?
top_signals.summary:
Container import bookings are riding a prolonged wave as new tariffs are reviewed. How much of this is tariff induced and what does it mean for domestic transportation markets?

top_signals.title: Majority of U.S. workers support an AI wealth fund as tech layoffs surge, survey finds
top_signals.summary: A majority of U.S. employees now want an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold corporations more accountable, according to a recent survey, as tech layoffs rise.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
